general.a: We offer Gummy Gurl, Nature Gurl, Lifted Labs, Phyto Kinetics, Good Karma, and Rize. Each focuses on different product types including edibles, pet wellness, functional products, and alternative experiences.
Our products are federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill (containing less than 0.3% Delta-9 THC by dry weight). Laws vary by state, and some products may not be available in certain locations.
Yes. All products are third-party lab tested for potency, purity, and safety. Lab reports (COAs) are available on our website at /lab-results.
A Certificate of Analysis is a lab report that verifies cannabinoid content and confirms the product is free of harmful contaminants like pesticides, heavy metals, and solvents.
No. These products have not been evaluated by the FDA and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

general.q: How old do I need to be?
general.a: You must be 21+ to purchase THC products.

delta8.a: Delta-8 THC is a cannabinoid derived from hemp. It produces mild psychoactive effects, typically more relaxing and less intense than Delta-9 THC.
Relaxation, mild euphoria, stress relief, body calm without heavy mental fog.
Yes, but generally a milder, smoother high compared to Delta-9.

delta8.q: How long does Delta-8 take to kick in?
delta8.a: Edibles: 30-90 minutes. Peak effects: 2-4 hours. Total duration: 4-8 hours.

delta8.q: How much Delta-8 should I take?
delta8.a: Beginner: 5-10mg. Intermediate: 10-25mg. Experienced: 25mg+. Always start low and increase gradually.

delta9.a: Delta-9 is the primary psychoactive compound in cannabis. Hemp-derived Delta-9 is legal if it remains below 0.3% by dry weight.
Yes. Delta-9 is generally more potent with stronger psychoactive effects.

delta9.q: Can I take Delta-8 and Delta-9 together?
delta9.a: Yes. Many products combine both for a balanced effect (Delta-8 for body relaxation, Delta-9 for mental uplift).

safety.q: What happens if I take too much THC?
safety.a: Anxiety, drowsiness, dry mouth, increased heart rate. Effects are temporary. Stay hydrated and rest.

safety.q: Can I drive after taking THC?
safety.a: No. Do not operate vehicles or machinery after consuming THC products.

safety.q: Will this show up on a drug test?
safety.a: Yes. Delta-8 and Delta-9 may both trigger a positive drug test.

cbd.a: CBD (Cannabidiol) is a non-psychoactive compound found in hemp that supports relaxation, recovery, and overall wellness.
Stress management, sleep support, recovery, and general wellness.

cbd.q: Can I take CBD with THC?
cbd.a: Yes. CBD can help balance THC effects and reduce intensity.

mushrooms.a: No. Our mushroom products are legal alternatives and do not contain psilocybin.

mushrooms.q: What do your mushroom gummies do?
mushrooms.a: Mood elevation, relaxation, mild euphoric experience, sensory enhancement.

mushrooms.q: How long do mushroom products take to work?

pets.a: Yes. Our pet products are formulated specifically for animals with safe, appropriate levels of CBD.

pets.q: What do pet CBD products help with?
pets.a: Anxiety, joint support, calmness, and general wellness.

pets.q: Will CBD make my pet high?
How much should I give my pet?
pets.a: Follow product dosing instructions based on your pet's weight.

shipping.a: We ship to states where our products are legally allowed. Flat rate $8 shipping, free on orders over $99.
Processing: 1-2 business days. Shipping: 2-5 business days.
Yes. Tracking information is provided once your order ships.
Orders can only be canceled before they are processed.

subscriptions.a: Our subscription program lets you receive products on a recurring basis and save 10% on every order.
Subscribers receive 10% off on recurring orders.

subscriptions.q: Can I change or cancel my subscription?
subscriptions.a: Yes. You can manage, pause, or cancel anytime through your account at /account.
Every 2 weeks, monthly, every 2 months, or every 3 months.
